ns1:revision.ns1:text:
== Current Schedule ==
* Apr 13 2017 - Feature Freeze (open for feature Dec 8 2016) * May 31 2017 - Code Freeze * July 13 2017 - Release 2.10.0
(Note: these are very rough guidelines. For more accurate details on the schedule please refer to LWG call minutes)
== Scope ==
=== Test Matrix === * Servers: RHEL 7.3 * Clients RHEL 7.3, SLES 12 SP2 * OFED: inkernel * E2FSProgs: v1.42.13.wc5 * Interoperability: 2.9 Servers/Clients
=== Features ===
The following features are under active development and could be possible for landing during the 2.10 release cycle
{| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Feature !! Developers !! Reviewers !! Testers !! Docs !! Confirmed in 2.10 |-
| [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-6283 NRS Delay Policy] || Chris Horn || Henri Doreau || Justin Miller || Chris Horn || Yes |- | [http://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Snapshots Simplified Userspace Snapshots] || Fan Yong || Niu Yawei || Saurabh Tandan || Fan Yong || Yes |- | [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-4017 Project Quotas] || Li Xi ||Andreas Dilger, Niu Yawei || Shuichi Ihara || Wang Shilong || Yes |- | [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-7734 Multirail LNET] || Amir Shehata, Olaf Weber || Amir Shehata, Olaf Weber, Doug Oucharek || Saurabh Tandan || Amir Shehata Olaf Weber || Yes |- | [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-8998 Progressive File Layouts] || Bobijam Xu || Lai Siyao, Niu Yawei, Jinshan Xiong || James Nunez || Emoly Liu || Yes |- |}
=== General Work and Maintenance ===
From the [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU Lustre project page] in the [https://jira.whamcloud.com Lustre issue tracker], we can see a dashboard for the project. On that page under the "Versions: Unreleased" section, there are links to future releases and all of the issues that are either targeted to be addressed in that release, or are already addressed for the release. Here is a shortcut to Lustre 2.10.0's issue summary page:
[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU/fixforversion/12204 Lustre 2.10.0 Issues]
Any issue that contains "Lustre 2.10.0" in the "Fix Version/s" field of a ticket is intended to be fixed for version 2.10.0. The Lustre 2.10.0 Issues list is fluid, and will be updated on a continual basis as man power and perceived priorities change.
If you would like to own one or more tasks for the release but are not currently listed in the drop-down list of developers in JIRA then please email [mailto:peter.a.jones@intel.com Peter Jones] to get that setup
A convenience search filter is supplied for anyone looking for work that needs to be done for 2.10.0:
[https://jira.whamcloud.com/issues/?filter=13015 Lustre 2.10.0 Unassigned Issues]
In addition, a search filter is available for anyone looking to start Lustre development with some simple development tasks, or anyone with a few minutes/hours available to improve Lustre:
[https://jira.whamcloud.com/issues/?jql=resolution=Unresolved%20AND%20labels=easy Lustre easy-to-fix issues]
[[Category: Releases]]
